# 509dds-data

> Open data, source documents, and analysis for SEIU Local 509's Disability
> Determination Services (DDS) chapter in Massachusetts. DDS = Disability
> Determination Services (adjudicates SSI/SSDI claims), NOT the Department of
> Developmental Services. Audience: union stewards, bargaining-team negotiators,
> 509dds.com developers, and researchers.

Every dataset has a `<file>.meta.json` data card (schema: `schemas/dataset.meta.schema.json`).
The full machine index is `catalog.json`. Confidence tiers: Authoritative,
Computed, Browser-fetch pending, PRR-pending, Structurally unavailable.

## SSA datasets (data/ssa) — normalized

- [Periodic CDR Case Backlog FY14–FY18](data/ssa/periodic-cdr-backlog-fy14-fy18.csv): national CDR backlog by program. Authoritative.
- [Periodic CDRs Processed FY13–FY22](data/ssa/periodic-cdr-fy13-fy22.csv): CDRs processed, hierarchical program taxonomy. Authoritative.
- [Combined Disability Processing Time, Monthly FY16–FY26](data/ssa/cdp-time-monthly-fy16-fy26.csv): national avg processing days. Authoritative.
- [Combined Disability Processing Time, Monthly FY08–FY15](data/ssa/cdp-time-monthly-fy08-fy15.csv): historical processing days. Authoritative.
- [DDS Net Accuracy by State FY07–FY22](data/ssa/dds-net-accuracy-by-state-2007-2022.csv): per-state QA accuracy. Authoritative.
- [Peer-State Determination Time Series 2010–2024](data/ssa/peer-states-timeseries-2010-2024.json): MA + 8 peer states, computed favorable rates. Computed.

## Contract (data/contract) — normalized

- [SEIU 509 Units 8 & 10 CBA 2024–2026](data/contract/seiu-509-cba-2024-2026.md): full collective-bargaining-agreement text, incl. DDS Supplemental Agreement O. Authoritative. (Hazard: readable text ends ~384,600 chars; binary PDF tail follows.)

## MassAbility / MRC / SRC annual reports (data/ma-annual-reports) — normalized

- [MassAbility Annual Report FY24](data/ma-annual-reports/massability-fy24.md): agency-wide report (Career Services, Home & Community Life, DDS). Authoritative.
- [MassAbility Annual Report FY25](data/ma-annual-reports/massability-fy25.md): first full FY under the MassAbility name; DDS staffing. Authoritative.
- [MRC Annual Report FY23](data/ma-annual-reports/mrc-fy23.md): last report under the MRC name, pre-rebrand. Authoritative.
- [SRC Annual Report FY22](data/ma-annual-reports/src-fy22.md): Statewide Rehabilitation Council advisory report. Authoritative.
- [SRC Annual Report FY23](data/ma-annual-reports/src-fy23.md): Statewide Rehabilitation Council advisory report. Authoritative.
- [SRC FY24 (unavailable)](data/ma-annual-reports/src-fy24.md): mislabeled duplicate of the MassAbility FY24 report — genuine SRC FY24 not present. Structurally unavailable.

## Reasonable-accommodation process (data/ra-process) — normalized

- [ADA Coordinator Listing 2026-03-10](data/ra-process/ada-coordinator-listing-2026-03-10.csv): MA Executive Branch ADA coordinators (93 rows). Authoritative.
- [RA/HR Contacts](data/ra-process/contacts.md): compiled MassAbility DDS RA/HR contact directory. Computed.
- [Disability Rights in Employment](data/ra-process/disability-rights-in-employment.md): MOD reference on workplace disability rights + RA process. Authoritative.
- [DLC Self-Advocacy Guide (Oct 2023)](data/ra-process/dlc-self-advocacy-guide-oct-2023.pdf): Disability Law Center self-advocacy guide (PDF). Authoritative.
- [MassAbility DDS Info](data/ra-process/massability-dds-info.md): employer profile for MassAbility DDS. Authoritative.
- [RA Application Page](data/ra-process/ra-application-page.md): HRD reasonable-accommodation request landing page. Authoritative.
- [RA Process — State Executive Branch](data/ra-process/ra-process-state-exec-branch.md): MOD procedural guide for EO 592 RA process + appeals. Authoritative.
- [SEIU 509 Units 8 & 10](data/ra-process/seiu-509-units-8-10.md): HRD page for SEIU 509 Units 8 & 10 (training fund). Authoritative.

## Other collections (rollout pending)

- data/pay-scales — Unit 8 salary charts + per-employee VDE salary/OT 2010–2023
- data/cthru-staffing — MA Comptroller (CTHRU) payroll headcount
- data/labor-rights — enforcement agencies, filing deadlines, member/steward guides
- data/workload — anonymized overtime + intake-cap evidence
- data/oversight, data/external, data/prr-responses, data/screenshots
- docs — methodology, data dictionary, agency disambiguation
- prr-templates — Public Records / FOIA request templates
